name: KuangChi Science Limited
summary: KuangChi Science Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of future technology products in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company provides KC N901 Smart Helmet for traffic police bayonet, hospitals, airport/rail transit/bus, pedestrian zone, scenic spots and parks, and office buildings. It also offers Cloud, a cloud platform that offers communication, internet access, and big data collection and analysis with applications in the field of monitoring system; ship and aircraft automatic identification system; radio and television broadcasting and Internet system; and private communication and command system. In addition, the company provides the traveler, a research and space services platform. Further, it offers administrative services, as well as trades in chips. The company was formerly known as Climax International Company Limited and changed its name to KuangChi Science Limited in September 2014. KuangChi Science Limited is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. KuangChi Science Limited is a subsidiary of New Horizon Wireless Technology Limited.
